data.title: International Tower Hill Mines reports positive results in antimony metallurgy study at Livengood Gold Project. TSX: ITH, NYSE: THM.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 4th September 2025 - International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. shared positive outcomes from the initial phase of the metallurgical examination on antimony mineralization at the Livengood Gold project. The Company, listed on both TSX as ITH and NYSE American as THM, stated that the results were promising.

data.title: Dating app RAW gives women control by allowing them to flag men’s behavior on profiles: green for positive, beige for neutral, and red for harmful. Men with more green flags gain visibility, while those with red flags are permanently removed. Moderated by a fixed list of flags.
data.description: In New York, a new feature on the dating app RAW is empowering women by allowing them to determine which men can remain on the platform. Through this feature, women can assess and flag men's behavior directly on their profiles by assigning colors: green for positive, beige for neutral, and red for harmful. Men with an accumulation of green flags will experience enhanced visibility on the app, while those with excessive red flags will face permanent removal. Significantly, the system is closely monitored, with women selecting flags solely from a preset list. This initiative signifies a shift towards giving women more control and influence in the online dating realm.

data.title: Salesforce's AI revolution disappointing as stock has plunged 28% in 2025, underperforming rivals. Q2 revenue $10.24 billion.
data.description: Salesforce, Inc.'s AI revolution, as reflected in its recent stock performance and guidance for 2025, has not met expectations. The company's stock (NYSE: CRM) has fallen by 28% this year, contrasted with competitors like SAP, Microsoft, and Oracle who have seen strong gains. This decline signifies a waning confidence among investors in Salesforce's growth potential and its AI monetization capabilities. In the second quarter, Salesforce reported revenues of $10.24 billion, a 10% increase year-over-year, slightly surpassing analyst predictions. Adjusted earnings per share were $2.91, exceeding estimates by 4.7%. Despite this, CRM stock is currently experiencing a downward trend.

data.title: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) reports Q2 FY 2026 results: revenues $237,743k, up $10,728k from previous year.
data.description: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) based in Arlington, Virginia, has reported its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 which concluded on July 31, 2025. The company disclosed consolidated financial highlights for the quarter ended July 31, 2025. Revenues for this period amounted to $237,743, reflecting a $10,728 increase from the same period in 2024 when revenues were $227,015. The company's gross profit and other key financial metrics will be discussed during an investor conference call scheduled for today, September 4, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: NFL star Saquon Barkley diversifies his investment portfolio with Bitcoin, Anduril, Neuralink, and Polymarket. Invested around $10 million in Bitcoin, tripling in value since, making a significant profit. Barkley is an early Bitcoin backer and has shown success in equity investments along with his football career.
data.description: Saquon Barkley, NFL star, won Super Bowl and Offensive MVP award after moving from NY Giants to Philadelphia Eagles. He made headlines for his investment strategy as he put $10 million endorsement money into Bitcoin, an early move that has paid off with Bitcoin tripling in value. Despite concerns after FTX's bankruptcy, his investment remained strong. Barkley's continued support for Bitcoin has resulted in successful earnings. He spoke at a Coinbase event, discussing Bitcoin with notable figures like Strike CEO and investor Anthony Pompliano. Barkley's success on and off the field is evident through his strategic investments.

data.title: Phreesia to acquire AccessOne for $160 million, expanding payment solutions suite - all-remote deal.
data.description: Phreesia, Inc. (NYSE: PHR), based in Wilmington, Del., a prominent player in patient activation, has revealed its plans to acquire AccessOne Parent Holdings, Inc. for $160 million in cash. AccessOne, owned by Frontier Growth, will be acquired in a deal anticipated to be finalized in the third quarter or early fourth quarter of this year. This acquisition marks a significant move for Phreesia in expanding its reach and offerings in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Camping World to pay $0.125 per share dividend on Class A Common Stock on September 29, 2025 to shareholders.
data.description: In Lincolnshire, Illinois, Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH) confirmed a regular cash dividend of $0.125 per share on its Class A Common Stock. This dividend is expected to be paid on September 29, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 15, 2025. The decision for upcoming quarterly dividends will rely on Camping World's Board of Directors' discretion.
German Budget Committee approves 2025 budget, clearing the path to parliamentary approval.

data.title: XRP in downtrend, but 3 data points predict 85% bounce to new highs. Chart signals $4.80 rebound by Q4 after leverage reset.
data.description: XRP leverage has been reset due to the emergence of accumulation signals. According to the altcoin's chart technicals, there are indications of a rebound to $4.80 by the fourth quarter.

data.title: HealthEdge and UST HealthProof merge under Bain Capital ownership creating healthcare payer technology leader.
data.description: HealthEdge and UST HealthProof have officially merged in Boston, with Bain Capital acquiring UST HealthProof from UST. The successful completion of the merger solidifies a significant transition in the healthcare industry. The deal marks a turning point in the industry, with key players seeing this move as a strategic one.

data.title: Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE) requests hearing on appeal to Nasdaq Hearings Panel for staff determination letter.
data.description: San Diego-based Nuvve Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: NVVE) is a company specializing in green energy technology. They offer a commercial vehicle-to-grid (V2G) platform allowing electric vehicle (EV) batteries to store and sell back excess energy to the electric grid. The company recently announced their request for a hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel to appeal a previous disclosure made on September 3, 2025. This move reflects Nuvve Holding Corp.'s commitment to addressing regulatory matters and ensuring transparency in their operations.

data.title: HPE beats Q3 earnings estimates with stock wavered, October sales guidance lower than expected. AI systems business growing.
data.description: HPE stock experienced fluctuations following the announcement of fiscal Q3 earnings that slightly surpassed projections, although the sales guidance for the October quarter fell short of expectations. The company's AI systems segment showed growth, contributing to the positive earnings report that exceeded estimates.

data.title: Lifecore Biomedical to attend 24th Contract Pharma Conference on Sept 18-19, 2025 in NJ; top event for outsourcing.
data.description: Chaska, Minnesota, September 4, 2025 - Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFCR), a leading contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO), disclosed its involvement in the 24th Annual Contract Pharma Contracting and Outsourcing Conference. The event, known for showcasing pharmaceutical outsourcing and manufacturing, is scheduled for September 18-19, 2025, in New Brunswick, New Jersey.
